__inputs.name: DS_GITHUB_GOVERNANCE_BIGQUERY
__inputs.label: GitHub Governance BigQuery
__inputs.description: Select the configured Google BigQuery datasource that can read the github_governance dataset.

description: User activity and access-review dashboard separating initiating actor from affected identity across curated GitHub governance events.

options.content:
### User Activity and Access Review
Investigate what an identity **initiated** and which identity was **affected** by an access or lifecycle event.  
**Actor:** `$actor` · **Affected identity:** `$affected_identity` · **Organization:** `$organization` · **Repository:** `$repository`  
This dashboard separates `actor` from `affected_identity`; it does not calculate behavioral risk scores.

panels.title: Events Initiated
panels.description: Curated governance events in the selected identity scope.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND review_priority IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)

panels.title: Access Grants
panels.description: Organization, team and repository access granted.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_event_type IN (
    'ORG_MEMBER_ADDED',
    'TEAM_MEMBER_ADDED',
    'REPOSITORY_MEMBER_ADDED',
    'REPOSITORY_TEAM_ADDED'
  )
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)

panels.title: Access Removals
panels.description: Organization, team and repository access removed.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_event_type IN (
    'ORG_MEMBER_REMOVED',
    'TEAM_MEMBER_REMOVED',
    'REPOSITORY_MEMBER_REMOVED',
    'REPOSITORY_TEAM_REMOVED'
  )
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)

panels.title: Organizations Touched
panels.description: Distinct organizations affected by the selected identity scope.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(
  NULLIF(org, ''),
  SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
)) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
LEFT JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)

panels.title: Repositories Touched
panels.description: Distinct repositories affected by the selected identity scope.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', ''))) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) != ''
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)

panels.title: Activity Timeline by Review Priority
panels.description: Daily activity using source event time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(event_time, DAY) AS time,
  review_priority AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS') AS BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE') AS ACCESS_GOVERNANCE,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'OAUTH_ACCESS_GOVERNANCE') AS OAUTH_ACCESS_GOVERNANCE,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY') AS IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE') AS ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'REPOSITORY_SECURITY_POSTURE') AS REPOSITORY_SECURITY_POSTURE,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE') AS WORKFLOW_AND_AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE,
  COUNTIF(governance_area = 'AUDIT_AND_EVIDENCE_INTEGRITY') AS AUDIT_AND_EVIDENCE_INTEGRITY
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)

panels.title: Top Actions
panels.description: Most common source audit actions in the selected identity scope.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  action,
  COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
GROUP BY action
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

panels.title: Access Granted vs Removed
panels.description: Direction of access changes performed by or affecting the selected identity.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN governance_event_type IN (
      'ORG_MEMBER_ADDED',
      'TEAM_MEMBER_ADDED',
      'REPOSITORY_MEMBER_ADDED',
      'REPOSITORY_TEAM_ADDED'
    ) THEN 'Granted / Added'
    WHEN governance_event_type IN (
      'ORG_MEMBER_REMOVED',
      'TEAM_MEMBER_REMOVED',
      'REPOSITORY_MEMBER_REMOVED',
      'REPOSITORY_TEAM_REMOVED'
    ) THEN 'Removed'
    ELSE 'Other access lifecycle'
  END AS access_direction,
  COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_area = 'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE'
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
GROUP BY access_direction
ORDER BY events DESC

panels.title: Top Affected Identities
panels.description: Identities whose access or account lifecycle changed most often.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  affected_identity,
  COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND affected_identity IS NOT NULL
  AND affected_identity != ''
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
GROUP BY affected_identity
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

panels.title: Access Events by Type
panels.description: Organization, team and repository access event families.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  governance_event_type AS access_event_type,
  COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_area = 'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE'
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
GROUP BY access_event_type
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

panels.title: Account and Critical Technical-Account Lifecycle
panels.description: Suspension and restoration events, with critical-account enrichment.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  review_priority,
  governance_event_type,
  action,
  actor AS initiated_by,
  affected_identity,
  affected_identity_user_id,
  review_reason
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_event_type IN (
    'CRITICAL_TECHNICAL_ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED',
    'CRITICAL_TECHNICAL_ACCOUNT_RESTORED',
    'USER_ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED',
    'USER_ACCOUNT_RESTORED'
  )
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
ORDER BY
  CASE review_priority
    WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1
    WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2
    WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 3
    WHEN 'LOW' THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END,
  event_time DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Recent Actions Initiated
panels.description: Full curated event history in the selected actor and affected-identity scope.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  actor AS initiated_by,
  review_priority,
  governance_area,
  governance_event_type,
  action,
  affected_identity,
  org,
  repository,
  review_reason
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 300

panels.title: Access Changes Performed
panels.description: Organization, team and repository access changes with actor and affected identity separated.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  actor AS initiated_by,
  affected_identity,
  review_priority,
  governance_event_type,
  action,
  org,
  repository,
  review_reason
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_area = 'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE'
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 300

panels.title: High / Critical Identity Review Queue
panels.description: High and Critical events after active review exceptions are applied.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  review_priority,
  actor AS initiated_by,
  affected_identity,
  governance_area,
  governance_event_type,
  action,
  org,
  repository,
  review_reason
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND review_priority IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_area:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_area = '${governance_area:raw}'
)
ORDER BY
  CASE review_priority
    WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1
    WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  event_time DESC
LIMIT 300

list.name: actor
list.label: Actor

query.query:
SELECT actor_name AS __text, actor_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS actor_name, 0 AS sort_order

  UNION ALL

  SELECT DISTINCT actor AS actor_name, 1 AS sort_order
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND actor IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(actor) != ''
    AND (
      '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
      OR org = '${organization:raw}'
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
        WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
              = '${organization:raw}'
      )
    )
    AND (
      '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
        WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
      )
    )
)
ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name
LIMIT 10000

list.name: organization
list.label: Organization

query.query:
WITH organizations AS (
  SELECT TRIM(org) AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND org IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(org) != ''

  UNION DISTINCT

  SELECT SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/') > 0
)
SELECT organization AS __text, organization AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT organization, 1 AS sort_order
  FROM organizations
  WHERE organization IS NOT NULL
    AND organization != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000

  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND org IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(org) != ''

  UNION DISTINCT

  SELECT SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/') > 0
)
SELECT organization AS __text, organization AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT organization, 1 AS sort_order
  FROM organizations
  WHERE organization IS NOT NULL
    AND organization != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000

list.name: repository
list.label: Repository

query.query:
WITH repositories AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) AS repository_name
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) != ''
)
SELECT repository_name AS __text, repository_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS repository_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT repository_name, 1 AS sort_order
  FROM repositories
  WHERE '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
     OR SPLIT(repository_name, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
)
ORDER BY sort_order, repository_name
LIMIT 10000

title: GitHub Governance — User Activity & Access Review
